message:
fix(tui): preserve search match selection when toggling graph/insights modes

Fix reselect_ranked_list_context() to restore the previous search
selection instead of always selecting the first visible item when
switching between view modes or cycling insights panels. Users no
longer lose their search highlight during mode transitions.

- Refactor selection restoration to check for active search match
- Add graph_mode_toggle_preserves_search_match_selection() test
- Add insights_panel_cycle_preserves_search_match_selection() test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
